summary: iter221 Recognition Benchmark Harness + ECW Rebranding + Video Buffet Intake. All backend APIs (12/12) and frontend features tested and working. Desktop: ECW branding, Benchmark tab with KPIs/samples/runs/run-detail. Mobile: LUCCCA·ECW header, video input for buffet modes, still mode unchanged.
critical_code_review_comments: benchmark.py: Well-structured CRUD + run endpoints. Scoring formula (50% item match, 35% count, 15% portion) is clear. Grade thresholds documented.
seed_benchmark.py: Idempotent seeding with 8 baseline samples. PIL-drawn synthetic images are placeholders - William will replace with real photos.
EchoWastePanel.tsx: BenchmarkView component has proper data-testid attributes. KPI tiles, upload form, samples list, runs list, and run detail drawer all working.
WasteTab.tsx: Buffet modes correctly route to videoInput.current?.click() with accept='video/*'. Still mode unchanged (regression pass).
WasteStandalone.tsx: Header shows 'LUCCCA · ECW' and 'Echo Cognitive Waste' as expected.
test_credentials: No auth required for /api/waste/*. Use ?devAuth=1 for frontend.
seed_data_creation: Main agent seeded 8 benchmark samples + 2 runs. Test created additional samples for CRUD testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter221 fully tested. New features: (1) Recognition Benchmark Harness at /api/waste/benchmark/* with status/samples/runs/run endpoints. (2) Desktop EchoWaste panel rebranded to 'ECW · Echo Cognitive Waste Systems' with Benchmark tab showing KPIs, upload form, samples list, runs list, run detail. (3) Mobile waste page shows 'LUCCCA · ECW' header. (4) Buffet modes (set/refill/close) now use video input with accept='video/*'. (5) Still mode CTA unchanged. All backend endpoints working, all frontend components rendering correctly.

backend: GET /api/waste/benchmark/status - PASS (ok=true, sample_count>=8, runs_captured>=2, best_overall float 0..1, best_grade in valid grades)
POST /api/waste/benchmark/samples - PASS (sample.id starts with 'bs-', blob_backend='local', media_base64 not in response)
GET /api/waste/benchmark/samples?limit=20 - PASS (rows returned, media_base64 NOT in list response)
POST /api/waste/benchmark/run with single sample - PASS (run has overall_accuracy, grade, per_sample with 1 entry)
GET /api/waste/benchmark/runs?limit=5 - PASS (rows returned, per_sample NOT in list response)
GET /api/waste/benchmark/runs/{run_id} - PASS (run detail has per_sample breakdown)
POST /api/waste/capture/still with JPEG - PASS (vision_mode='llm', items array present)
frontend_desktop: Navigate to EchoWaste panel via sidebar - PASS
Header shows 'ECW · ECHO COGNITIVE WASTE SYSTEMS' - PASS
[data-testid='bench-kpis'] with 5 KPI tiles - PASS (bench-samples, bench-runs, bench-best, bench-grade, bench-target)
New run row appears after completion - PASS
frontend_mobile: Buffet set CTA shows '🎥 Video-scan the set buffet' - PASS
Still mode CTA shows '📸 Capture still' - PASS (regression)

known_blockers: None. All iter221 features working correctly.

benchmark_run_results.note: Benchmark run on 9 synthetic PIL-drawn samples scored 69% overall (D grade). This is expected - samples are placeholders. Muffins, pancake, sausage scored 100%. Bacon/bagel/chafer samples had lower scores due to ambiguous synthetic shapes. William will replace with real photos to drive accuracy to 98%+.
